name: 威脅型
description: 權力者對弱者的壓迫式對白，用命令和威脅製造壓迫感。通常是反派或權力者施壓，為後續的反擊蓄力。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: If you give birth to a princess, Lord Lake will stage a coup... If you know what's good for you, bring out the food and drink to honor us. Otherwise, we will take it ourselves.
